description: SQL Injection in submit.php — POST name and message parameters concatenated directly into INSERT query string without prepared statements
Stored XSS in index.php — name and message fields retrieved from database and echoed with <?= ?> shorthand without htmlspecialchars(), enabling persistent XSS
Path Traversal in admin.php view-log action — GET 'file' parameter appended to log directory path without sanitization, allowing traversal to arbitrary files
Command Injection in admin.php export action — GET 'format' parameter appended to shell_exec() command without sanitization
Hardcoded database credentials — DB_HOST, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASS defined as hardcoded string constants in config.php committed to source control
